bassshakertelemetry.config.title: Bass Shaker Telemetry
bassshakertelemetry.config.title.tooltip: Waxay furaysaa dejinta Bass Shaker Telemetry.
bassshakertelemetry.config.game_sound_de: Dooro qalabka dib-u-ciyaarista Windows ee Minecraft u adeegsato codka ciyaarta caadiga ah.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_device: Dooro qalabka dib-u-ciyaarista Windows ee mod-ku u adeegsado output-ka haptics.
bassshakertelemetry.config.master_volume: Awoodda guud ee dhammaan saamaynta haptics.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_damage.t: Fur dejimaha haptics ee la xiriira dhaawaca.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_movement: Fur dejimaha haptics ee dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo dhulka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_misc.too: Fur dejimaha kala duwan iyo qalabka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_incomi: Daar haptics marka aad dhaawac qaadato.
Daar haptics marka aad wax ku dhufato weerar melee ah.
bassshakertelemetry.config.combat_hit_co: Daar jawaabta garaaca ee server-ku xaqiijiyo; waxay dareemi kartaa dib-u-dhac marka loo eego garaacyada maxalliga ah.
Xoogga saamaynta garaaca ee server-ku xaqiijiyay.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_enab: Daar texture dhaqdhaqaaq oo joogto ah oo ku salaysan xawaare iyo dardargelin.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_flig: Xoogga texture dhaqdhaqaaqa marka la duulayo.
Xoogga texture hawada jihaysan marka hawada lagu socdo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_swim: Xoogga texture dhaqdhaqaaqa marka la dabaalanayo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_wate: Xoogga texture biyaha jihaysan marka biyaha lagu socdo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.footsteps_ena: Daar haptics tallaabooyinka marka la socdo ama la ordayo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mounted_enabl: Daar tallaabooyinka iyo saameynta marka la fuushan yahay.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_haptics: Daar haptics-ka uu kaxeeyo codka ciyaarta sida saameyn iyo qaraxyo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_gain.to: Xoogga guud ee haptics-ka uu codku wado.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_hapt: Daar haptics ciyaareed la sameeyay sida qodid iyo garaacyo dhaqdhaqaaq.
bassshakertelemetry.config.biome_enabled: Daar dhawaaqyo gaagaaban marka biome cusub la galo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accessibility: Muuji HUD shaashadda dusheeda oo sharaxaya haptics-ka shaqaynaya.
bassshakertelemetry.config.demo_run.tool: Bilow taxane demo si loo eego saamayno badan.
bassshakertelemetry.config.test.tooltip: Dheh tijaabo gaaban oo saamayntan ah.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_cooldow: Waqtiga ugu yar ee u dhexeeya qaraxyada haptics codka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_cool: Waqtiga ugu yar ee u dhexeeya qaraxyada haptics-ka ciyaarta.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mining_period: Waqtiga millisekan ee u dhexeeya garaacyada qodista.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_buffer: Cabbirka kaydka maqalka ee output-ka haptics. Kayd yar wuxuu yareeyaa dib-u-dhaca laakiin wuxuu sababi karaa dhawaq dildilaac ah nidaamyada qaar.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_fre: Joogga dhexe ee shaandhada EQ ee output-ka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_gai: Qadarka kor u qaadista ama dhimista ee shaandhada EQ ee output-ka.
bassshakertelemetry.config.smart_volume_: Daar Mugga Smart si loo simo si otomaatig ah.
Heerka output-ka bartilmaameedka ah ee Mugga Smart isticmaalo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_30hz: Dheh tone 30 Hz oo joogto ah si loo habeeyo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_60hz: Dheh tone 60 Hz oo joogto ah si loo habeeyo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_sweep_20_: Dheh sweep si loo helo resonances iyo meelaha daciifka ah.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_stop.tool: Jooji tijaabo kasta oo kalibreynta socda.
bassshakertelemetry.spatial.title: Spatial
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_bus.title: Routing bus
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_cal.title: Kalibreynta spatial
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_dbg.title: Debugger-ka spatial
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.st: La doortay: %s | Ku xidh ilaha: %s | Output: %s
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.title: Sound Scape (7.1)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Iswaafajin sax ah oo furaha ah (aan xasaasi u ahayn xaraf weyn)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.enabled.t: Daar ama dami habka routing-ka Sound Scape.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.groups.to: Wax ka beddel kooxaha kanaallada ee magacyeysan oo loo adeegsan karo bartilmaameedyo routing.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Wax ka beddel overrides-ka routing-ka ee dhacdo kasta ku salaysan furayaasha debug.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_add: Abuur koox cusub oo Sound Scape ah.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_del: Tirtir kooxdan; kooxda caadiga ah ee 'All' lama tirtiri karo.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_nam: Magaca kooxdan, oo loo adeegsanayo bartilmaameedka routing-ka grp:<name>.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_cha: Beddel haddii kanaalkan lagu daro kooxda.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.override_: Furaha debug-ga ee la waafajinayo iyadoo la adeegsanayo iswaafajin sax ah oo aan xasaasi u ahayn xaraf weyn.
Dooro kanaalka ama kooxda bartilmaameedka ah ee dhacdooyinka iswaafaqa.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.roa: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka texture dhaqdhaqaaqa.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.dam: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka dhaawaca.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.bio: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka dhawaaqa biome.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.acc: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka garaaca dardargelinta.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.sou: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka haptics-ka uu codku kaxeeyo.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.gam: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka ciyaarta.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.foo: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka tallaabooyinka.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.mou: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka fuulitaanka iyo duulitaanka.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.min: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka lulista qodista.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.cus: Dooro bartilmaameedka routing-ka ee dhacdooyinka gaarka ah ama kale.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.in: Dooro garaafka qalabka ee aad rabto inaad wax ka beddesho.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.re: Dib uga soo rar qalabka disk-ga oo tuur wax ka beddelka aan la kaydin.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.ad: Dooro nooca node-ka ee la darayo.
Ku dar node cusub oo nooca la doortay ah.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.se: Deji node-ka la doortay inuu noqdo output-ka qalabka.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.sa: Kaydi garaafka qalabka hadda jira disk-ga.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.co: Ku koobi JSON-ka qalabka la doortay sabuuradda.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.te: Dheh tijaabo gaaban adigoo isticmaalaya garaafka qalabka hadda jira.
